title: Force Item Battle++
description: Force Item Battle is a fast-paced Minecraft mode where people must complete random Item tasks under time pressure to earn points.
body:
### **_Force Item Battle_**
Force Item Battle is a competitive Minecraft game mode where players must obtain, craft, or use randomly assigned items within a limited time. Each successfully completed item grants points, while failures cost time and disrupt the game flow. Players can configure the duration of timers and the number of jokers in the plugin’s configuration file.

## **Important Notes:**

- The plugin does not save progress, so all data resets on server restart.

- Commands include /battle start, /battle resume, /battle pause, /battle stop, and /battle results (which displays final rankings).

- Small chat messages are displayed in German, but all item tasks appear in English.

The challenge emphasizes quick decision-making, adaptability, and game knowledge, as the items are often impractical or situationally difficult. Perfect for PvP-focused challenges, multiplayer events, and content creator videos.
